headline: OpenAI restricts Cyber access after criticizing Anthropic's limitations strategy
body: OpenAI has begun restricting access to its Cyber model, mirroring the same limitation strategy it previously criticized Anthropic for implementing with Mythos. The move signals a shift in OpenAI's approach to model distribution and competitive positioning. For healthcare AI vendors, this underscores the instability of relying on single-provider model access for clinical applications and EHR integrations. Organizations building on proprietary foundation models now face increased uncertainty around availability and terms, raising questions about vendor continuity in value-based care implementations.
